crabcc.description: sym · refs · callers · outline · files · fuzzy for symbol lookup. --dev surface adds _openapi + _health diagnostics. Use --count or --files-only flags whenever the full hit list is not needed (saves 99%+ tokens). Skip memory.* unless explicitly working on the memory layer.

repowise.description: PR mode: get_risk(changed_files=[...]) first for blast radius + directive. Then get_answer/get_context/get_symbol for architecture. get_why before any refactor. Skip get_dead_code (cleanup sprint only) and get_overview (already indexed).

context7.description: query-docs for Rust crates in this repo: tokio · serde · rusqlite · tantivy · clap · anyhow · axum. resolve-library-id optional — skip if library ID already known (format /org/project). Default: keep query-docs responses to 5000 tokens; fall back to a narrower query if the first result is too broad.
